data.title: Global Connectivity
data.description: Enables billions to connect globally without communication barriers.
data.technical_spec: Available in multiple languages, works over standard internet protocols.

data.title: Privacy-Centric Focus
data.description: Valued for its commitment to user privacy and security.
data.technical_spec: End-to-end encryption and no data storage on central servers.

data.title: Seamless User Experience
data.description: Fosters an effortless and intuitive messaging platform.
data.technical_spec: Smooth user interface with minimalistic design principles.

data.title: Reliability
data.description: Ensures service availability with minimal downtime.
data.technical_spec: Robust server infrastructures and optimized delivery protocols.

data.title: Cross-Platform Presence
data.description: Access from any device broadens its usability scope.
data.technical_spec: Apps available natively on iOS and Android, web and desktop clients.
